description_long: This is a dark glass wine bottle with a cylindrical body and a long, narrow neck, topped with a reddish-brown closure. The bottle features a large, white rectangular label that wraps around most of its body, with a hexagonal bordered section on the front displaying the text 'Ancient Grape Wine' in red. The neck is covered by a matching reddish-brown capsule, giving the bottle a classic and elegant appearance. The glass is opaque, suggesting it is filled with red wine, and the overall design is typical of bottles used for premium wines. The bottle's surface appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly.
description: A dark glass wine bottle with a reddish-brown capsule and a white label reading 'Ancient Grape Wine.' The bottle is sleek, cylindrical, and elegant.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bottle's label area, but the main text is not visible.
description_view_1: Front view with the hexagonal bordered label clearly displaying 'Ancient Grape Wine.'
description_view_2: Side view showing the edge of the label and part of the hexagonal border, with most text not visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain white back of the label with no text or graphics.
attribute_label_or_branding: A large white rectangular label wraps around the bottle, with a red hexagonal border on the front containing the text 'Ancient Grape Wine' in red. The label is centered and covers most of the bottle's body.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, narrow, straight neck with a slight taper toward the top and a flared lip.
